Egress I  

Description

1: Evacuate target to safe point in zone

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 10
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 10 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso sinks into the ground.

Game Description

Opens a mystical portal that transports you to a relatively safe location in the current zone.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Egress

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Egress
ClassLevel
DRU52
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (19)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Quested (1)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Egress
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2009 at 9:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342313664
9 posts
This FV turn-in spell exchange quest is still buggy after years. I turned in the 4 different spells at the same time and got two each of two spells, neither of which was Egress. After turning in 4 more this time identical spells all the same time, she finally gave me the Egress spell and two others. Self only not group, not target, 5 second cast, which with spell haste is 4.3 seconds or so and puts you in same zone.
▲ Page top
Egress
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2009 at 3:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791849211
139 posts
How is it buggy??? You are supposed to get a random spell from the list of possible reward spells. There is no guarantee as to which you get. You could end up getting the same reward spell 50 million times in a row and it wouldn't be buggy.. just unlucky.
▲ Page top
Samitha Lightheart Loc
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2008 at 5:41 AM Rating: Decent
DaiaSpiritlight
Scholar
137 posts
With the take-over of FV, this lady (who you need to find for the druid spells quest) is a bit of a pita to find in the new "good" village. Her location is pos 1036, neg 3149, pos 175. She is all by herself on a hillside just to the northeast of when you come out of the new village tunnel.

Hope this helps!
____________________________
Bright Blessings to All!

Lady Daia Spiritlight
High Priestess of Quellious, Rathe Server
High Priestess of Quellious, Mischief Server
▲ Page top
Not Egrets
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2005 at 10:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
Not to be confused with Egrets! Which are of course flightless artic water fowl.
▲ Page top
RE: Not Egrets
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2005 at 8:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1686529156677
View User Forum
Scholar
119 posts
I hope that zoology is not your field... Egrets DO fly. They are in the crane family of birds, most commonly found around cattle in field, living off the insects that are stirred up and around the farm animals.

Now... I think your comment was cute as well as the Heron comment :)
▲ Page top
RE: Not Egrets
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2008 at 4:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761217696
3 posts
Fortunately for this discussion, there is an ornithologist in the house!

ACTUALLY, egrets are not in the "crane family." They are not even in the "crane order":

Cranes are in the family Gruidae, order Gruiformes.
Egrets are in the family Ardeidae, order Ciconiiformes.

Egrets DO fly. And they DO frequent pastures and comsume insects, but can also be found in myriad other habitats and consume a wide variety of prey (fish, frogs, snakes, lizards, crayfish, small mammals, etc.)... pretty much anything of the proper size that they can catch.

Just in case anybody cared =D

▲ Page top
RE: Not Egrets
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2005 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362773308
32 posts
Whew, that made the Heron the back of my neck stand on end.

lessor succor
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2004 at 10:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592762502863
30 posts
What is the diffrence between this and Lessor Seccor
▲ Page top
RE: lessor succor
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2005 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1676852216161
14 posts
As I read the spell Lesser Succor is a group and Egress is a single target
▲ Page top
RE: lessor succor
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2004 at 3:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592762564700
1 post
Lesser Succor has a casttime of 10,5 compared to 5 with Egress. Manacost is 150 on Lesser Succor compared to 100 with Egress. Egress is far better than Lesser Succor if you are in a hurry :)
▲ Page top
RE: lessor succor
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2004 at 6:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751437183
View User Forum
Scholar
151 posts
Also, Lesser Succor drains about 300 mana from everyone in the group, which I believe includes the casting Druid (making LS actually 450 mana cost, though you only need 150 to trigger it). Egress does NOT drain extra mana.

Also, It's self-only. Almost forgot that part. :p
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 14 2004 at 12:12 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 75 cents to see the Egress!
what spells
QuoteReply
# May 06 2003 at 11:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787216493
1 post
What spells will she hand out besides egree? anyone know?

Lurwein Fairweth
Druid 50th Season

Long Live Nobles of Radiance!
▲ Page top
RE: what spells
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 6:25 PM Rating: Excellent
CrystalCast
Scholar
36 posts
Samantha Lightheart in FV will give randomly one of:
...Upheaval
...Egress
...Call of Karana
...Glamour of Tunare
If you give her one of:
...Circle of Winter
...Circle of Summer
...Spirit of Scale
...Form of Howler


Edited, Tue May 27 18:44:04 2003
____________________________
65th turning Druid of Tunare
65th song Bard of Tunare
Necro of 17 tappings
▲ Page top
Firiona Vie - Spell Quest
QuoteReply
# May 01 2003 at 6:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758423492
View User Forum
Sage
308 posts
https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=413

The four trade-in spells are:

Circle of Summer
Circle of Winter
Spirit of Scale
Form of the Howler

Hand one of the four into Samitha Lightheart in Firiona Vie and you will get random spells as a reward.

▲ Page top
Which Vendor
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2003 at 6:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1656893911100
View User Forum
175 posts
Which vendor is selling this please?
▲ Page top
RE: Which Vendor
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 7:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966371891
1 post
If you go to GD, kill the crystaline wurms and check ancient too,they drop spells, turn them in for other spells if you go to Firiona Vie look for Samitha Lightheart near the Druid spell vendors and she will hand out another spell. Egress is one of them

Search the internet to see, you have 4 spells that you can give her (one at a time) and she gives you back one of 4 spells available. If you are lucky, you will get all those you need soon enough.

If not, go to bazaar, some are expensive but if you can't otherwise, its nice to know where to get them.
